textByHashes.4062416ca48d6f47273b41dfe66b66cf6438e961: Hello! What can I do for you today?
textByHashes.2aca6f77f3d95ad0a5b64e38cba3f7f6649803f9: And it's great to meet you, .
textByHashes.466cac9f014d868922ec06c1bdfd8388038ba087: I'm the village miller. I keep the wheat growing strong and turn it into flour.
textByHashes.16710a92e3d80e484fd07abc46ab9ddce5144a01: Thank you! I try to keep it clean. Feel free to use the mill whenever you please.
textByHashes.69bf45236b6b8aca76e67c2e8bf1addb7e5bd935: Was there anything else you wanted?
